name: com.hidano.vtuber-system-base.output-renderer-shell
description: Composition root and minimal scene shell for the main output process (Display 2). Provides scene roots (Stage / Characters / Lights / Cameras / Volume), default URP camera/light/global volume, IDisplayRoutingService abstraction, IOutputCommandDispatcher (state/event/request-response), and IOutputDiagnostics. Receives commands from the UI process via VTuberSystemBase.CoreIpc abstractions; never renders any UI overlay onto the main output surface.

samples.description: Minimal PlayMode scene with a single OutputSceneBootstrapper. Open in PlayMode to verify the full Requirement 1-9 behavior end-to-end (scene roots, default URP camera/light, global volume, display routing, dispatcher, diagnostics).
